eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Pierce; King; Snohomish; Island; Jefferson; Kitsap, WA; at 7:35 AM on SEP 18, 2019 Effective until 8:35 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is Pierce County Emergency Management conducting a test of the Emergency Alert System. In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information. The following tones will conclude this test.
